title: Alport Syndrome
buzzwords: Young boy with persistent microscopic hematuria
Family history of kidney failure on dialysis
Triad of kidney, ear, and eye disease
Progressive glomerulonephritis with sensorineural hearing loss
Bilateral high-frequency sensorineural deafness in adolescence
Basket-weave splitting of glomerular basement membrane
X-linked COL4A5 mutation in type IV collagen
